description: catwalk has come up with yet another scrumptious pair of off-duty sandals for women. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or ethnic outfits. Upper Toe separator and pom-poms on a transparent midfoot strap Smooth footbed for extra comfort Embossed branding on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with a raised heel Sandal Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
